name: South West Ethiopia Peoples' Region (Ethiopia)

colors.symbolism: the field, for the land and its peoples
the outer band of the hoist triangle
peace, in the middle band of the hoist triangle
the inner band of the hoist triangle

description: A green field with a triangular pile at the hoist layered in blue, white, and red, and a yellow five-pointed star fimbriated in white toward the fly.
history: The South West Ethiopia Peoples' Region was formed in November 2021 from five zones and one special woreda that voted in a 2021 referendum to leave the Southern Nations, Nationalities, and Peoples' Region. Its capital is Bonga, and the flag was adopted with the new region.
